channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners
item.description: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners to help enterprises move from AI pilots to production with secure, scalable agent deployments. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/frontier-alliance-partners

item.title: Our First Proof submissions
item.description: We share our AI model’s proof attempts for the First Proof math challenge, testing research-grade reasoning on expert-level problems. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/first-proof-submissions

item.title: Advancing independent research on AI alignment
item.description: OpenAI commits $7.5M to The Alignment Project to fund independent AI alignment research, strengthening global efforts to address AGI safety and security risks. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/advancing-independent-research-ai-alignment
